title: haplopappus viridialbus
intro: Haplopappus viridialbus, also known as green rabbitbrush, is a flowering shrub native to the western United States and Canada, characterized by its greenish-yellow flowers and silvery-green foliage. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Haplopappus viridialbus include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to soothe sore throats, calm coughs, and promote overall well-being.
